required_patterns.component-composition: All UI components follow a composition pattern using Radix UI primitives with React.forwardRef
required_patterns.styling-system: Use Tailwind CSS utility classes with cn() utility for conditional class application
required_patterns.component-structure: Components are organized into business logic components (/components) and reusable UI primitives (/components/ui)
required_patterns.icon-system: Use Lucide React icons consistently across the application

architectural_constraints.radix-primitives: All interactive UI components must be built on top of Radix UI primitives for accessibility
architectural_constraints.tailwind-only: No custom CSS files - all styling must use Tailwind utility classes
architectural_constraints.design-tokens: Use predefined color system (primary, secondary, destructive, muted-foreground, etc.)
architectural_constraints.responsive-design: All components must be responsive using Tailwind's responsive utilities

required_patterns.app-router: Use Next.js App Router with file-based routing in /app directory
required_patterns.route-groups: Protected routes are organized under (dashboard) route group
required_patterns.layout-hierarchy: Nested layouts for authentication and dashboard structure
required_patterns.server-components: Pages are Server Components by default, use 'use client' directive only when needed

architectural_constraints.authentication-guard: All dashboard routes require authentication check in layout.tsx
architectural_constraints.redirect-pattern: Use Next.js redirect() for authentication flow
architectural_constraints.nested-layouts: Dashboard layout includes sidebar and authentication logic

required_patterns.prisma-orm: All database operations must use Prisma Client
required_patterns.server-actions: Use Next.js Server Actions for data mutations
required_patterns.type-safety: Use generated Prisma types for all database operations
required_patterns.transaction-safety: Database operations include proper error handling

architectural_constraints.sqlite-database: Database is SQLite with Prisma as the only data access layer
architectural_constraints.schema-migrations: All schema changes must go through Prisma migrations
architectural_constraints.server-only: Database operations can only occur in server actions or server components

required_patterns.session-based: Use custom session-based authentication with tokens stored in cookies
required_patterns.server-actions: Authentication logic is handled through server actions
required_patterns.user-context: Current user is fetched through getCurrentUser() server action

architectural_constraints.cookie-sessions: Session tokens are stored in HTTP-only cookies
architectural_constraints.no-jwt: No JWT tokens - uses simple session tokens with database lookup
architectural_constraints.server-side-auth: All authentication checks happen on the server side

required_patterns.react-hooks: Use React hooks (useState, useEffect, useOptimistic, useTransition) for client state
required_patterns.server-state: Server state is managed through Server Actions and revalidatePath
required_patterns.optimistic-updates: Use useOptimistic for immediate UI feedback on mutations
required_patterns.form-state: Form handling uses Server Actions with FormData

architectural_constraints.no-global-state: No global state management library (Redux, Zustand, etc.)
architectural_constraints.form-actions: All form submissions use Server Actions pattern

required_patterns.component-variants: UI components use class-variance-authority for variant management
required_patterns.typography-system: Font system managed through lib/fonts.ts with Poppins as custom font
required_patterns.color-system: Semantic color naming (primary, secondary, destructive, muted-foreground)

architectural_constraints.radix-foundation: Design system is built on Radix UI accessibility foundation
architectural_constraints.tailwind-variables: Colors and spacing use CSS custom properties through Tailwind
architectural_constraints.no-css-modules: No CSS modules or styled-components - utility-first approach only

required_patterns.recharts-library: All charts must use Recharts library
required_patterns.responsive-charts: Charts use ResponsiveContainer for responsive behavior
required_patterns.consistent-styling: Chart colors follow design system color palette
required_patterns.tooltip-styling: Custom tooltip styling matches application theme

architectural_constraints.recharts-only: No other charting libraries - Recharts is the single source for data visualization
architectural_constraints.data-transformation: Chart data must be transformed to match Recharts expected formats

required_patterns.hello-pangea-dnd: Use @hello-pangea/dnd for all drag and drop functionality
required_patterns.optimistic-updates: Drag operations use optimistic updates with server sync
required_patterns.kanban-structure: Drag and drop follows kanban board pattern with columns and tasks

architectural_constraints.single-dnd-library: Only use @hello-pangea/dnd - no other drag and drop libraries
architectural_constraints.server-sync: All drag operations must sync to server via Server Actions
